description_long: This is a dark brown glass bottle with a long, slender neck and a rounded, bulbous base. The bottle features several cream-colored paper labels with hand-drawn or sketched designs and text, some of which are bordered in red. A prominent red wax seal is affixed to the neck, with wax drips extending down toward the body, suggesting a premium or vintage beverage. The neck is wrapped with a cream label that has red and green markings, adding to the ornate appearance. The bottle's surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the overall design suggests it is intended for alcoholic beverages such as wine or spirits.
description: A dark brown glass bottle with ornate cream labels and a red wax seal, featuring a glossy finish and vintage design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main cream label with a sketched design and a prominent red wax seal on the neck.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the side of the main label and the wax seal, with more of the bottle's curvature visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large, mostly blank cream label and no wax seal, highlighting the bottle's rounded back.
description_view_3: Side view showing a secondary cream label with a sketched design and the edge of the main label, with the wax seal partially visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Multiple cream-colored paper labels with hand-drawn or sketched designs and text, bordered in red, placed on the front, back, and neck of the bottle.
